title: Treasure Hunt
description: You can get lootbags with good loot
body:
Embark on a thrilling adventure with the Treasures hunt" mod, where ancient artifacts and hidden loot await discovery! This mod introduces powerful new items and features:

Cloak of Shadows: Harness the power of shadows with this rare item that grants you temporary invisibility, perfect for sneaking past enemies or escaping dangerous encounters. But be careful—its magic is limited!

Soulbound Necklace: A life-saving talisman that ensures you never lose your inventory upon death. The necklace is consumed when it activates, offering a one-time safeguard for your most valuable items.

Treasure Hunt: Explore the world and uncover mysterious lootbags hidden within dungeons, caves, and temples (but now only with killing mobs). These lootbags come in different tiers—Common, Rare, Epic, Mythic, and Legendary—each containing unique and powerful items, from rare resources to enchanted gear.

Treasure hunt blends the thrill of exploration with the allure of powerful artifacts, making every adventure in Minecraft a quest for the ultimate treasure!
